name: Data Classification Enforcement
description: Scans data repositories for misclassified or unclassified data and enforces the organization's data classification policy. A code node queries DLP systems for data discovery results, Riggs AI evaluates classification accuracy against the data classification framework, and misclassified data is flagged with remediation tickets. Data owners are notified of classification corrections needed.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Purview
required_integrations.reason: Scan data repositories for classification labels and sensitive data discovery

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create remediation tickets for misclassified data findings

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify data owners and governance team of classification issues

config.description: Triggers weekly data classification enforcement scan across all repositories
Query DLP system for data discovery results including unclassified and potentially misclassified data

config.additional_instructions: Evaluate data discovery results against the organization's classification framework (Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted). Identify misclassified data, unclassified sensitive data, and classification label inconsistencies. Prioritize findings by data sensitivity and exposure risk.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of data classification accuracy across all repositories
Routes based on whether misclassified or unclassified sensitive data was detected

parameters.summary: Data Classification Issue: {{analyze_1.misclassified_count}} items require reclassification

config.description: Create a Jira ticket for data classification remediation
Notify data governance team and data owners of classification issues

parameters.note: Weekly data classification scan complete. All data properly classified per organizational policy. No remediation needed.

config.description: Data classification enforcement complete -- findings documented and data owners notified
